description_long: This is a modern L-shaped desk featuring a spacious, matte black surface supported by four angled wooden legs. The main tabletop is rectangular, with an attached secondary surface extending perpendicularly to form an L-shape, providing additional workspace or a dedicated area for equipment. The desk's legs are made of light-colored wood, contrasting with the dark tabletop, and are splayed outward for stability and style. There is a modesty panel beneath the main surface, adding structural support and a touch of privacy. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements. Its sturdy construction and ample surface area make it suitable for professional or creative work environments.
description: A modern L-shaped desk with a matte black surface and angled wooden legs, featuring a spacious dual-level workspace and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main black tabletop, modesty panel, and angled wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shaped extension and the depth of both surfaces.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the full L-shape and the relative sizes of the two connected surfaces.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the L-extension and the supporting legs.
attribute_orientation: The longer rectangular surface is intended to face the user, with the L-shaped extension on the left providing additional workspace; the modesty panel and open leg space indicate the front.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or collaborative office desk
